episodes.title: Panzer VIII Maus
episodes.desc: The heaviest tank ever built. 188 tonnes of steel ambition that never fired a single shot in anger.

episodes.title: Landkreuzer P.1000 Ratte
episodes.desc: A thousand-tonne land battleship. The most absurd engineering fantasy the Third Reich ever committed to paper.

episodes.title: Karabin wz. 35
episodes.desc: Poland's secret anti-tank rifle — so effective its existence was classified by the very army that built it.

episodes.title: T28 / T95 Super Heavy Tank
episodes.desc: America's answer to the Siegfried Line — a 95-tonne fortress on tracks that arrived too late for the war it was built to win.

episodes.title: Object 279
episodes.desc: Designed to survive a nuclear blast and keep fighting. The Soviet heavy tank that made every NATO commander nervous.

episodes.title: Goliath — Tracked Mine
episodes.desc: The remote-controlled demolition vehicle that preceded the drone age by eighty years. First deployed during the Warsaw Uprising.
